title: euonymus pauciflorus subsp. oligospermus
intro: Euonymus pauciflorus subsp. oligospermus is a subspecies of Euonymus pauciflorus, commonly known as Chinese spindletree or Chinese wingnut, a plant native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Euonymus pauciflorus subsp. oligospermus include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Euonymus pauciflorus subsp. oligospermus include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or other medicinal products.
